title: The Logic Taking Root

features.name: circuit-becomes-root
features.desc-on-touch: A logic gate dissolves into veins. Computation finds its way into soil.

features.name: silicon-sprout
features.desc-on-touch: A chip grown into a plant. The archive's hardware is learning to live.

features.name: geometric-growth
features.desc-on-touch: Patterns branch like trees. Symmetry has learned asymmetry.

features.name: dusk-canopy
features.desc-on-touch: Logic reaches upward in the shape of leaves. The theorem becomes a tree.

features.name: rooted-archive
features.desc-on-touch: The casing finds earth. Solar panel turns dusk orange; antenna drinks the twilight.

inscription: the circuit board stops being a map and becomes a root; the archive discovers it was always growing downward

file.name: Logic_Transformation_Series_Dusk_Study.png
file.note: A sequence of images where mathematical diagrams gradually absorb soil and shadow, becoming indistinguishable from tree rings.

exits.label: back up to where vision still descends
deeper into the dark where roots know the archive's equations
west to where other casings learn to grow
